Agriculture Department
Secretariat, 29th August 2018
Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana for Kharif Crops during 2018.
No. II(2A)/AG/777/2018.
[Agriculture – Notification of Agricultural Crops and Horticultural Crops,  Districts,  Firkas,  Revenue Villages,  Insurance 
Units and approved premium rates for Kharif,  2018 season under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana - Publication in 
the State Government Gazette – Orders – Issued.]
The following Government Order is Published;—
[G.O. Ms.No. 123,  Agriculture (AP2),  3rd May 2018,  CˆF¬ó 20,  M÷‹H,  F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´-2049.]
Read :
1. 	
Minutes of the 40th State Level Coordination Committee on Crop Insurance under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana meeting 
held on 27.3.2018.
2. 	
From the Director of Agriculture letter No.G1/ 16901 /2018,  dated 19.04.2018.
ORDER:—No. 123,  Agriculture (AP2),  3rd May 2018
1.	
The 40th State Level Coordination Committee on Crop Insurance meeting for notifying Kharif Crops during 2018-2019 under Pradhan 
Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) was held on 27.3.2018 and the Committee accepted to notify the Crops,  Districts,  Firkas and Revenue 
Villages for Agricultural and Horticultural Crops and for notification of Insurance Units and publication in the State Gazette.
2. 	 In his letter second read above,  the Director of Agriculture has stated that the Sowing Season for Kharif Crops in Tamil Nadu commences 
in the month of April and prolongs upto September. Hence the Crops / Insurance units need to be notified for implementation of PMFBY during 
Kharif 2018. Accordingly,  the 40th State level Coordination Committee meeting was conducted on 27.03.2018 to notify Kharif Agricultural & 
Horticultural Crops during 2018-2019 under PMFBY and the Committee has notified the insurance units and approved premium rates. In accordance 
to this,  he has sent a proposal for notification of Kharif Crops during 2018-2019 and requested the Government to issue orders and also publish 
the notification in the Government Gazette.
3. 	 The Government,  after careful examination of the proposal of the Director of Agriculture accept the same and accordingly hereby notify 
the Crops,  Districts,  Firkas,  Revenue Villages,  Insurance units and approved premium rates for Agricultural Crops and Horticultural Crops for 
the effective implementation of the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana during Kharif,  2018 season as shown in the Annexures I,  II,  III and IV 
to this order.
4. 	 The claims under the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana Scheme shall be settled on the basis of yield data furnished by the Director, 
Department of Economics and Statistics as per prescribed cut-off dates for the notified crops / districts / firkas / revenue villages for the effective 
implementation of Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana scheme for Kharif,  2018 season and not on the basis of the Annavari Certificate / Gazette 
notification declaring the area as Drought / Flood / Cyclone affected etc.,  by the District Collectors.
(By Order of the Governor)


2
 
 
PRADHAN MANTRI fASAL BIMA YOJANA (PMfBY) 
NOTIfICATION fOR KHARIf CROPS DURING 2018-2019 
ANNEXURE I to G.O.(Ms).No.123, Agriculture (AP.2) Department, dated 3.5.2018. 
Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima yojana (PMFBy) will be implemented in all the 
districts of Tamil Nadu (except chennai) with the state Government subsidy during 
2018-2019 for Kharif crops. 
 
I. 
OBJECTIVES Of PMfBY: 
PMFBy aims at supporting sustainable production in agriculture by way of  
a) Providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage arising out of 
unforeseen events. 
b) stabilizing the income of farmers to ensure their continuance in farming. 
c) Encouraging farmers to adopt innovative and modern Agriculture practices. 
d) Ensuring flow of credit to the agriculture sector, which will, contribute to food 
security, crop diversification and enhancing growth and competitiveness of 
agriculture sector besides protecting farmers from production risks. 
 
II. 
COVERAGE Of fARMERS: 
All farmers including share croppers and tenant farmers growing the notified 
crops in the notified areas are eligible for coverage. 
 compulsory for Loanee farmers. 
 Optional for Non - Loanee farmers. 
 
III. 
COVERAGE Of RISKS AND EXCLUSIONS: 
The following stages of the crop and Risks leading to crop loss are covered 
under the scheme: 
 
1. PREVENTED SOWING/ PLANTING RISK – If Insured area is prevented from 
sowing / planting due to deficit rainfall or adverse seasonal conditions and non 
release of irrigation water on scheduled date of opening of dam for irrigation in its 
command areas. 
2. STANDING CROP (SOWING TO HARVESTING) - comprehensive risk 
insurance is provided to cover yield losses due to non - preventable risks viz. 
Drought, dry spells, flood, inundation, pests and diseases, landslides, natural fire  


3
 
and lightening, storm, hailstorm, cyclone, typhoon, tempest, hurricane and 
tornado.  
3. POST-HARVEST LOSSES - coverage against specific perils of cyclone, 
cyclonic rains and unseasonal rains is available only upto a maximum period of 
two weeks from harvesting, for those crops which are allowed to dry in cut and 
spread condition in the field after harvesting.  
4. LOCALIZED CALAMITIES - Loss/damage resulting due to occurrence of 
identified localized risks viz., hailstorm, landslide and inundation affecting 
isolated farms in the notified area.  
 
In the 40th sLcccI meeting conducted on 27.03.2018 for notification of crops 
during Kharif 2018, the committee has authorized the District Level Monitoring 
committee under the chairmanship of District collector to fix the seasonality discipline 
for prevented sowing/failed sowing and Post harvest losses at farm level and invoking 
mid-season adversity for on-account payment (vide G.O.Ms.No.293, Agriculture (AP6) 
Department, dated 12.9.2016) as done during 2016-2017 and 2017-2018. 
Sl. 
No 
Localized Perils 
Districts Notified

hailstorm/strom

IV. 
SUM INSURED: 
The scale of Finance approved by the state Level Technical committee for 
2018-2019 shall be adopted as sum Insured for the crops notified during 2018-2019 
as per Para.No.VII(1) of the Operational Guidelines of  under Pradhan Mantri Fasal 
Bima yojana . The sum Insured will be the same for both loanee and non-loanee 
farmers.  
 
 
 


4
 
V. 
PREMIUM RATE AND PREMIUM SUBSIDY: 
FARMER’S PREMIUM:   
Actuarial Premium Rate (APR) would be charged under PMFBy by the 
Implementing Agency (IA). The rate of Insurance charges for Kharif crops (All Food 
Grains (cereals, Millets, Pulses) & Oilseeds) payable by the farmer is  2.0% of  sum 
Insured or Actuarial rate, whichever is less while it is 5% of sum Insured or Actuarial 
rate, whichever is less for Annual commercial / Annual horticultural crops.

VII. 
NOTIFICATION OF DISTRICTS,CROPS, BLOCKS, FIRKAS, REVENUE VILLAGES 
fOR KHARIf 2018 UNDER PMfBY.

 Revenue Village shall be notified as insurance unit for major crops and Firka for 
other crops during Kharif 2018 under PMFBy.

IX. 
MANDATORY DOCUMENTS fOR ENROLMENT 
The following documents are mandatory for enrolment 
 Proposal form 
 Registration form 
 Adangal 
o Adangal alone for enrolment of Loanee & Non-Loanee farmers in 
normal cases.  
o sowing certificate issued by VAO in case of prevented sowing and 
purchase of insurance before sowing 
 A copy of Aadhar card 
 A copy of first page of Bank Pass Book

such as Paddy, Maize and cotton only.
